title: Man Held For Assaulting Pregnant Wife, Forcing Miscarriage In Odisha
description: According to the First Information Report (FIR), Nayak, a resident of the CRPF campus under G. Udayagiri police limits in Kandhamal district, had allegedly coerced the woman into marriage through blackmail. After their marriage, the woman accused him of subjecting her to sustained mental and physical abuse
